title: Space manifest — space.yaml (v1)
description: No single §5 table enumerates space.yaml's fields (Open Q1). Derived from §4.2's layout comment ('manifest: space id, schema version, participants, gates config, notification routes') plus the A2.13 excerpt. Fields named in prose but absent from A2.13 (full `gates` sub-shape, notification routes) are typed permissively (open) pending a normative table.

schema.description: Literal value per A2.13's golden fixture — NOT `manifest/v1` (see phase deviations note: naming tension between this value and the sibling envelope/event/consumes URI convention, unresolved upstream).

min_binary_version.description: D-013: stale binaries refuse to operate against a space above their known version.

gates.description: Gates config (G1-G5, §3.7) — full sub-shape not tabulated in §5 (Open Q1); typed permissively.

vendored.description: Read-only vendor mirrors (§4.4); item shape not tabulated in §5 (Open Q1) — typed permissively.
